---
title: "Contact"
---

**Email**  
[yawen004@e.ntu.edu.sg](mailto:yawen004@e.ntu.edu.sg)

**GitHub**  
[https://lilyyawenliu.github.io/yawenliu.github.io/](https://lilyyawenliu.github.io/yawenliu.github.io/)

<!--
**Google Scholar**  
[Scholar Profile](https://scholar.google.com/)
-->

<!--
    **ORCID**  
    [ORCID Profile](https://orcid.org/)
-->

**LinkedIn**  
[LinkedIn Profile](https://www.linkedin.com/in/yawen-liu-1b0005273/)
